meaning: n.华沙(波兰首都),华沙省(波兰省名)
examples: The hotels of Warsaw, Prague and Budapest were bursting at the seams.
He was a courier for the Polish underground and parachuted into Warsaw.
The three-month 1900-mile journey from Paris to Warsaw is Dubanchet's way of raising awareness of food waste in Europe and throughout the world.
Wizz Air flights to Warsaw and Gdansk, which began in March, continue to prove popular.
Marek Belka, the new Polish prime minister, is in a deeply insecure political position in Warsaw.
